chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-271 of 2026 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Priority 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.1230/2026 3. For hearing of main case 26.02.2026. Mr. Naveed Ahmed, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. K.A Vaswani, Asstt. Advocate General. --------------- A statement has been submitted by the learned A.A.G enclosing a compliance report as well as comments with it being affirmed by learned counsel for the Petitioner that the Petitioner’s appeal/representation before the redressal committee has been decided. Under the circumstances, it appears that the purpose of this Petition has been served. The same stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
